_publications._publicationTitle: Genomic imbalance of HMMR/RHAMM regulates the sensitivity and response of malignant peripheral nerve sheath tumour cells to aurora kinase inhibition.

_contextSnippet: the cellular responses to MLN8237 were significantly different (p=0.02) with S462 being the more sensitive
details: S462 cells showed higher sensitivity to MLN8237 compared to 2884 cells (p=0.02), despite equivalent AURKA expression and growth rates
